Package org.rodinp.core

Class RodinDBException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
org.rodinp.core.RodinDBException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RodinDBException extends org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
A checked exception representing a failure in the Rodin database. Rodin database exceptions contain a Rodin-specific status object describing the cause of the exception.
Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IRodinDBStatus
  • IRodinDBStatusConstants

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • nestedCoreException

      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException nestedCoreException

  • Constructor Details

    • RodinDBException

      public RodinDBException(Throwable e, int code)
      Creates a Rodin database exception that wraps around the given Throwable. The exception contains a Rodin-specific status object with severity IStatus.ERROR and the given status code.
      Parameters:
      e - the Throwable
      code - one of the Rodin-specific status codes declared in IRodinDBStatusConstants
      See Also:
      • IRodinDBStatusConstants
      • IStatus.ERROR

    • RodinDBException

      public RodinDBException(org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException exception)
      Creates a Rodin database exception for the given CoreException. Equivalent to RodinDBException(exception,IRodinDBStatusConstants.CORE_EXCEPTION.
      Parameters:
      exception - the CoreException

    • RodinDBException

      public RodinDBException(IRodinDBStatus status)
      Creates a Rodin database exception for the given Rodin-specific status object.
      Parameters:
      status - the Rodin-specific status object

  • Method Details

    • getException

      public Throwable getException()
      Returns the underlying Throwable that caused the failure.
      Returns:
      the wrapped up Throwable, or null if the direct cause of the failure was at the Rodin database layer

    • getRodinDBStatus

      public IRodinDBStatus getRodinDBStatus()
      Returns the Rodin database status object for this exception. Equivalent to (IRodinDBStatus) getStatus().
      Returns:
      a status object

    • isDoesNotExist

      public boolean isDoesNotExist()
      Returns whether this exception indicates that a Rodin database element does not exist. Such exceptions have a status with a code of IRodinDBStatusConstants.ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST. This is a convenience method.
      Returns:
      true if this exception indicates that a Rodin database element does not exist
      See Also:
      • IRodinDBStatus.isDoesNotExist()
      • IRodinDBStatusConstants.ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST

    • printStackTrace

      public void printStackTrace(PrintStream output)
      Prints this exception's stack trace to the given print stream.
      Overrides:
      printStackTrace in class org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Parameters:
      output - the print stream
      Since:
      3.0

    • printStackTrace

      public void printStackTrace(PrintWriter output)
      Prints this exception's stack trace to the given print writer.
      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Since:
